description: Systematic debugging: root cause before any fix — reproduce first, read the actual error, isolate with hypothesis tests and bisection, one change at a time, verify against the original symptom; escalation rule after three failed fixes. Includes /debugging:debug.

interface.longDescription:
Systematic debugging: root cause before any fix — reproduce first, read the actual error, isolate with hypothesis tests and bisection, one change at a time, verify against the original symptom; escalation rule after three failed fixes. Includes /debugging:debug.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Systematic debugging: root cause before any fix — reproduce first, read the actual error, isolate with hypothesis tests and bisection, one change at a time, verify against the original symptom; escalation rule after three failed fixes. Includes /debugging:debug.

name: debugging
